Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Write-Output corrupting scan JSON stdout

Write-Output sends to stream 1 (stdout), which gets redirected into
scan.json.tmp, prepending '::warning::...' before the JSON and making
it unparseable. Change to Write-Host which goes to the console/info
stream and doesn't corrupt the redirected output.

This caused all repos to fail validation on the first run after PR #55
because they all had old scan.json without _cache_version, triggering
the incremental-disabled warning path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add coding standards to copilot-instructions based on review feedback analysis

Analyzed Copilot code review feedback across all 44 merged PRs and identified
recurring themes. Added targeted coding standards to reduce future review
findings:

- HTML/XSS safety (flagged in 14 PRs): escaping rules, innerHTML vs textContent
- Accessibility (8 PRs): aria-labels, contrast, keyboard navigation
- GitHub API pagination (4 PRs): always paginate, rate limit caching
- JavaScript patterns (4 PRs): URL encoding, parseInt NaN, regex caching
- PowerShell patterns (5 PRs): Select-Object -Unique, += in loops, -match case
- Test quality (4 PRs): no fixed sleeps, isolate state, semantic assertions
- Duplicated logic (5 PRs): extract shared helpers
- Documentation accuracy (8 PRs): keep comments/docs in sync with code

Consolidated existing PowerShell Gotchas into the new PowerShell Patterns section.

automatically deleted. Stores msgId at dialog creation, clears it on
approval/denial, and auth hook composite-touches session + dismisses
any pending dialog on success.

reauth-dismiss.test.ts deferred (runtime passing).
